$comment: Source manifest for the BB plugin component registry (plugin design §5.5). `uiItems` lists the shadcn-shaped components under apps/app/src/components/ui that are published as registry:ui items; every file in their transitive @/-import closure becomes its own item automatically (scripts/build-registry.mjs), so this list is the only thing to edit when adding a component. BB-specific components sharing the directory are excluded until deliberately listed. `overrides` swaps app-internal files for plugin flavors (paths relative to apps/app/src → packages/plugin-registry/src). `dependencyPins` forces npm versions where latest breaks the vendored source.
